name_en: [Genuine Leather] LOULOU PUFFER_ Large 35cm. Quilted Lambskin Bag, made with genuine authentic leather, soft and delicate to the touch, like holding a cloud ☁️; classic Y-logo, chain, and buckle hardware are all in Brushed Gold hardware; the bag uses a magnetic snap closure at the opening, offering excellent sealing and security! Features a zippered interior pocket for phone and valuables, otherwise no extra pockets, easy to use! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Genuine leather! Size: 23x15.5x5.8cm Style No: 620333 Denim 168450
